name: helm
description: Expert guide for Helm — authoring charts, Go/Sprig templating, the helm CLI, release lifecycle (install/upgrade/rollback), discovering existing charts and repositories, and debugging chart and release failures with lint, template, dry-run, and manifest inspection.

interface.shortDescription: Helm chart authoring, templating, CLI, and debugging
interface.longDescription: Author and template Helm charts, drive the helm CLI and release lifecycle, discover existing charts and repositories, and debug chart and release failures with lint, template, dry-run rendering, and manifest inspection.
defaultPrompt: Use Helm to create a production-ready chart for this app.
Use Helm to debug why this chart fails to render or this release is broken.
Use Helm to review and harden this chart's templates and values.
